# Mob Arrows Retriever

Mob Arrows Retriever is a mod that allows you to retrieve arrows shot by mobs that missed their target. This is inspired by the switch games from the series "The Legend of Zelda", where you can pick up arrows shot by bokoblins.

![Gif showing mod in action](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Feelzor/Mob-Arrows-Retriever/refs/heads/main/src/main/resources/assets/arrowretriever/showcase.gif)

## Compatibility

The mod should easily work with most other mods, but compatibility issues may arise. If you encounter a problem, do not hesitate to [leave an issue](https://github.com/FeelZoR/Mob-Arrows-Retriever/issues) to let me know, and I'll try to fix it.
